title: Cobbled Berries
description: Cobblemon Addon which adds Hyperspace berries.
body:
Cobbled Berries is a Cobblemon addon which adds Hyperspace berries!

Hyperspace berries can be obtained by crafting a Hyperspace Portal and placing it down in your world. You can physically throw any berry into the portal! After a few seconds, its hyperspace counterpart will be spat out. Each Hyperspace Portal can convert up to 8 berries.

Hyperspace berries are much stronger than their default counterparts, having boosted effects when used in lures, baits, and snacks.
